title: Dulux Decorator Centre is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dulux Decorator Centre is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
